---
title: "David Martinez"
subtitle: "My Data Science Portfolio"
# use quarto markdown to 
---

# Welcome to my Portfolio
## About Me

I am currently attending BYU-Idaho, getting my Bachelor's in Data Science alongside a minor in Software Development (expected graduation: Winter 2026). I am a proactive problem solver with a sharp vision, strong attention to detail, and a passion for data and software development. 

### My Skills
- **Languages & Frameworks:** Python, SQL, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, C#, Java, Dart
- **Tools & Tech:** PowerBI, DAX, GitHub, VS Code

Feel free to explore my projects using the sidebar navigation. You can also view my previous projects on [GitHub](https://github.com/DMartinez06B/Flight_Delays_DS)!
